revenue_ttm_implied.note: Implied from market_cap / P/S ratio; bundle report_period is 2025-10-26 (Q3 FY2026)

checks.notes: Sources range 53.7%-55.6%. Deviation is within normal timing differences.
Q1 FY2026 operating margin reached 65.02%. TTM through Jan 2026 was ~60.4%. Our value of 59.0% reflects a slightly earlier TTM window (report_period 2025-10-26). All within 20% threshold.
Multiple sources confirm PE ratio of 40.25-41.28 as of early May 2026. Excellent match.

checks.source: GuruFocus / StockAnalysis / NVIDIA Newsroom (FY2026 ending Jan 2026)
checks.notes: Our value is implied from market_cap / P/S ratio using report_period 2025-10-26 (Q3 FY2026). The $215.9B is the full FY2026 (ending Jan 2026) figure. TTM through Oct 2025 would legitimately be lower. Deviation of 15.3% is within the 20% threshold.
Multiple sources confirm ~$4.82T market cap as of May 4, 2026. Near-perfect match.
GuruFocus reports 124.44% annualized for Q1 FY2026. Our 121.54% TTM is consistent. Multiple sources range 101.5%-124.44%; all within expected variance.

Web sources are inconsistent: 58.06% (MLQ.ai), 72.74% (FinanceCharts Feb 2026), 77.1% (Investing.com/Finbox). Our value of 86.39% is elevated vs. the most commonly cited range. Deviation vs. 77.1% is 12.0%, which is within the 20% threshold. No correction applied, but value noted as high end of observed range.

overall_status: all checks passed — no mismatches above 20% threshold
data_note: Facts bundles use report_period 2025-10-26 (Q3 FY2026 data). Some metrics will differ from full FY2026 figures by design. PE ratio and market_cap match current data precisely. Revenue implied from P/S ratio is consistent with Q3 FY2026 TTM window.
